title: Sabaody’s Cruel World: Turning Point

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: I don't want to be a slave!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: But I can't repay that much...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #23
dialogue.text: for the rest of our lives....!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #6
dialogue.text: I love this side of you, Nami!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: All right, all right. Everyone's getting excited!!!
